what_it_does: Single-source catalogue of deck-slide ARCHETYPES for the CV_REGISTRY. Defines a META map (per-archetype name/icon/desc) and a SAMPLES map (representative ConceptV sample content per archetype), then derives `seeds` — one CV_REGISTRY Type per archetype (id 'surface.deck-slide.<key>', layer 'surface', family 'deck-slide', runtime {kind:'core-archetype', key}, defaults from SAMPLES). Exposes via window globals and module.exports.
observations: IIFE module; plain JS with no compile/imports so it can load without the bundle

~30 archetypes defined: cover, split, statement, compare, modes, triptych, metric-band, checklist, timeline, profile, terms, gallery, closing, stepper, diagram, plus capital-raise additions (product-cover, product-closing, photo-divider, logo-wall, team, dashboard, reasons, orbital, stacked, spectrum, manifold, fidelity)
Header comment states this replaced three duplicate archetype lists (app stubs, WS_LAYOUTS, core/Slide)
Schema lives here; RENDERER for each archetype is a builder in core/Slide.jsx keyed by the same `key` (Type-vs-runtime separation, explicitly compared to block.* Type vs WS_BLOCKS[k].render)

SAMPLES contains real ConceptV business content: actual names (Tim Geldard CEO, Michael Baggott CTO, Jackie Nishimura CPO, Grant Plummer CSO), real metrics ($1.5M+ IP, 41,500+ users, 70+ hubs), contact details, fundraising figures ($800k committed, $1M round, $5.5M pre-money)
seeds tag each Type with ['deck','slide','archetype',key] and provenance 'built-in'
id when an object item lacks id falls back to label (in the diagram graph edge mapping)
Dual export: window.CV_ARCHETYPE_META / window.CV_ARCHETYPE_CATALOG and module.exports
Comment asserts the module is 'Token/voice-pure — metadata only, no new design'
standouts: Explicitly named as the deduplication fix — collapsing a thrice-duplicated archetype list into one home (the DS prime directive made concrete)
Carries real, specific ConceptV pitch-deck content (names, financials, contacts) as defaults — making this both a schema registry and a content seed
Type/runtime split: schema here keyed by `key`, renderer in Slide.jsx keyed by the same `key`
conventions: Follows DS 'single source of truth' / 'one catalogue, never a parallel list' rule
Plain-JS-no-compile + dual window/module export pattern for build-free loading
Mirrors the WS_BLOCKS pattern (defaults double as preview seed; Type vs render keyed by same key)
concerns: Real personal contact details and financial figures (phone, email, valuations, exit multiples like '91×') are embedded as sample defaults — sensitive business data living in a code catalogue
notes: The one home for ~30 deck-slide archetype Types — schema + icon + real ConceptV sample content — that seeds CV_REGISTRY; renderers live keyed by the same key in Slide.jsx.
questions: Are the embedded financials/contacts intended to ship as defaults, or only as design-time preview placeholders?
What guarantees every META key has a matching builder in Slide.jsx (the comment says add one entry + one builder, but nothing here enforces it)?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — stated as the single archetype catalogue that both halves read; the code derives exactly that set of registry seeds.
apparent_themes: schema vs renderer separation keyed by a shared id
intention_signals: Trying to eliminate a thrice-duplicated archetype list by establishing one canonical catalogue that both the bundle renderer and the app registry read, with representative content so each archetype previews meaningfully.
novelty: An archetype catalogue whose `defaults` are the company's actual pitch-deck content, doubling the schema registry as a populated preview/content seed.
contribution: Contributes the canonical deck-slide archetype vocabulary (~30 named slide types with icons, descriptions, and rich sample content) and the id/runtime-key contract linking each Type to its Slide.jsx builder — the catalogue a fused system would keep as its slide-archetype dictionary.
summary_for_embedding: Plain-JS IIFE catalogue defining ~30 deck-slide archetype Types (META + ConceptV sample SAMPLES) seeded into CV_REGISTRY, keyed by `key` to renderers in Slide.jsx.
intention_for_embedding: To be the single source of the deck-slide archetype schema and sample content, replacing three duplicate lists read by both the bundle renderer and the app registry.
